35.reason: [Using fgets with buffer size 2014 on a 1024-byte array causes buffer overflow; should be <=1024]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.2 , reason:  Typo: should be 1024 instead of 2014 to match the array size.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Error: The size argument 2014 exceeds the buffer size of s (1024), which may cause buffer overflow. Should be sizeof(s) or 1024.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Error: Buffer overflow risk. The size argument 2014 exceeds the array size of s (1024). It should be sizeof(s) or 1024.
